case_number: Criminal Miscellaneous Application No. S-303 of 2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No. S-303 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 02.01.2026 Mr. Irfan Umrani advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Hashim Laghari advocate for the applicant. Mr. Neel Parkash, D.P.G. = Mr. Irfan Umrani advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Hashim Laghari advocate for the applicant and he, under instructions, states that the impugned Order is dated 24-04-2024 and substantial time has already lapsed, whereby there is every likelihood that the trial of the case would have either concluded or would be at its verge end. Accordingly, he does not press this Criminal Miscellaneous application with permission to initiate fresh application if above factual aspect is found to be incorrect. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed accordingly. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
